form.formComment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 3 length win at this track over 401m in 22.92. Looks the one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 3 length win at this track over 401m in 22.92. Looks the one to beat again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a 5 length winner (22.92) over 401m at this track. Can win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a 5 length winner (22.92) over 401m at this track. Can win again.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by a neck at this track (22.97) beating Baby Time in a Grade 5 on March 27. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by a neck at this track (22.97) beating Baby Time in a Grade 5 on March 27. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn, lost ground and fell.
Checked off heels in the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 431m at Gunnedah. Happy to risk in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 431m at Gunnedah. Happy to risk in this.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fourth (23.61) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 5 for the first time. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time when fourth (23.61) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 5 for the first time. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was hampered by contact in the turn out of the back straight.
At the start began awkwardly; At the first turn was tightened for room.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by half a length at this track (18.47) beating Corless Devious in a Maiden on March 25. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 320m at this track. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but before that placed two on end, the most recent when second (26.04) over 457m at Temora. Tough draw to overcome and will need everything to go his way.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on April 1 over 520m at this track behind Raymar Shame beaten 16 lengths (31.11) in a Grade 5. Expected to go very well.
